action: Implement the executable provenance-preserving queue reconciler specified by M-005, with deterministic fixtures for supersession, ownership, conflicts, handoffs, provenance, and canonical output.

progress.verification: Six deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files.
progress.privacy_boundary: Public repository state, commit identity, and abstract project decisions only.

handoff: Next continuity item should wire repository file discovery and commit ancestry into the reconciler, publish a generated current-view artifact without replacing source history, and add the test suite to CI.
